name: The Case of Cam's Missing Mower
description: Someone has stolen Cam's riding lawn mower from Spring Lake trailer park. Track it down.
lore: Cam woke up Tuesday morning to find his riding mower gone.
The grass is already a foot tall. The park manager is sending letters.
Someone saw tire tracks heading toward the old roller rink.
What kind of person steals a kid's lawn mower?

map_mods.description: Tire tracks appear on the road from Spring Lake to Roller World

roller_basement.name: Roller World Basement
roller_basement.description: The abandoned basement under the old skating rink. Dusty, dark, smells like old skate leather.

cam.name: Cam
cam.description: A teenager standing in front of his trailer, looking bummed. The grass is very tall.
dialog_start: Cam: Dude. Someone stole my riding mower.
Cam: I know, who steals a lawn mower? But here we are.
Cam: The grass is like a foot tall. Park's gonna fine me.
Cam: My neighbor said she saw tire tracks heading north...
Cam: Toward that old Roller World building on Red Arrow.
Cam: Can you check it out? I'd go but... I'm coding.
[Quest accepted: The Case of Cam's Missing Mower]
[Check the old Roller World skating rink for clues]
dialog_found_tracks: Cam: You found tracks at Roller World?
Cam: There's gotta be a way into the basement.
Cam: Be careful down there. That place has been abandoned for years.
dialog_found_mower: Cam: You found the mower?! And fixed it?!
Cam: Here, I was gonna sell these but you earned them.
They are mostly Charmanduds but one is a holographic Charipokewhatzafuckzard.
It is definitely not a real Pokemon card. But it glows.
dialog_complete: Cam: *gives thumbs up while driving past*

neighbor.name: Mrs. Henderson
neighbor.description: Nosy but helpful neighbor at Spring Lake.
dialog: Mrs. Henderson: Oh honey, I saw the whole thing.
Mrs. Henderson: Three AM, some fool riding that mower down the road.
Mrs. Henderson: Headed north toward that old skating rink.
Mrs. Henderson: Lakeshore Roller World. Been closed for years.
Mrs. Henderson: I TOLD the police but you know how they are.
[Clue: Check Roller World on Red Arrow Highway]

roller_world_sign.name: Old Sign
roller_world_sign.description: A faded sign outside the abandoned Roller World.
dialog: The sign is faded and peeling.
'LAKESHORE ROLLER WORLD - FAMILY FUN SINCE 1993'
Someone has spraypainted 'CLOSED 4EVER' on it.
You notice fresh tire tracks leading around the back...
They match a riding lawn mower's wheel pattern.
[Found tire tracks! A way into the basement should be nearby.]

the_mower.name: Cam's Mower
the_mower.description: A riding lawn mower, slightly dented, covered in dust.
dialog: It's Cam's mower alright. John Deere, green and yellow.
Someone tried to repaint it but gave up halfway.
The key is still in the ignition.
You start it up. Still runs!
[Cam's mower recovered! Return to Cam.]

small_engine_guy.name: Earl
small_engine_guy.description: Owner of Stevensville Small Gas Engine. Knows everything about every engine in town.
dialog: Earl: Yeah I heard about the mower.
Earl: John Deere LT155, right? I serviced that last spring.
Earl: Kid takes good care of it. Shame someone swiped it.
Earl: You know, old Roller World has a loading dock in the back.
Earl: Big enough to drive a mower into. Just sayin'.
[Hint: Look for a loading dock behind Roller World]

boss.name: The Mower Thief
boss.description: A sketchy dude in a hockey mask who has been hoarding stolen yard equipment.
dialog: A figure emerges from behind a pile of stolen weedwhackers.
Mower Thief: HEY! This is MY collection!
Mower Thief: Do you know how long it took to steal all these?!
Mower Thief: You'll never take me alive! *revs leaf blower*

stages.description: Talk to Cam at Spring Lake trailer park.
Mrs. Henderson saw someone heading to Roller World.
Found tire tracks at old Roller World.
Defeated the Mower Thief in the basement.
